notes: GNN-CB LLM best-of-5 baseline. Rebuttal experiment for R3-W1/R2 (matching human 5-run tuning budget). Generated by Claude Opus 4.7 (claude-opus-4-7) under frozen prompt template prompt.md (agent mode). Five independent GNN solutions drawn (SAGE, SAGE-lite, GAT, GIN, deep-SAGE); final submission selected by best VAL F1 (leak-free, mirrors humans picking 1 final from 5 tuning runs). Winner = sample_5: 3-layer GraphSAGE + BERT(768)+spaCy(300)+profile(10) = 1078-d node features, hidden=128, BatchNorm+dropout=0.4, mean+max pool + root-MLP, BCEWithLogitsLoss, Adam lr=8e-4 wd=1e-3, batch=64, early stop val F1 patience=6, threshold sweep 0.20-0.80 step 0.005 (=0.455). seed=552. Local val: F1=0.9787, Acc=0.978. Best-of-5 diversity: 67/1092 test graphs differ across the 5 samples. CPU only, wall-clock 154s. Zero repair iterations.
